plan.feature: Electron Migration — Web Monorepo to Desktop IPC
plan.summary: Migrate EscalaFlow from a web monorepo (Hono HTTP API + React Vite SPA) to a single Electron desktop app with IPC communication. 9 phases: scaffold electron-vite, setup main process with DB, convert 34 HTTP endpoints to tipc IPC handlers, wrap motor in worker thread, create preload bridge, move React app to renderer and rewrite 8 service files from fetch to IPC invoke, integration verification, packaging with electron-builder, cleanup of old monorepo structure. Business logic (motor) and UI (React pages/components) remain untouched — this is purely a plumbing migration.

phases.name: Scaffold Electron
phases.description: Initialize electron-vite project structure, configure build system, set up unified package.json with all dependencies, externalize better-sqlite3 native module from bundle.

subtasks.title: Create electron-vite config
subtasks.description: Create electron.vite.config.ts at project root with 3 sections: main (Node target, externalize better-sqlite3), preload (Node target, externalize), renderer (browser target, React plugin, @/ alias resolving to src/renderer/src/). Use externalizeDepsPlugin from electron-vite for native modules. Configure worker thread resolution with ?modulePath query support.

verification.expected: No errors — config file is valid TypeScript

subtasks.title: Create unified package.json
subtasks.description: Rewrite root package.json: remove workspaces array, add all dependencies from apps/api (better-sqlite3, zod), apps/web (react, react-dom, react-router-dom, zustand, @dnd-kit/*, lucide-react, sonner, @radix-ui/*, etc), add NEW deps (electron, @egoist/tipc), add devDeps (electron-vite, electron-builder, @electron-toolkit/tsconfig, @electron-toolkit/preload, @vitejs/plugin-react, autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss, typescript, @types/*). Remove hono, @hono/node-server, tsx. Add scripts: dev (electron-vite dev), build (electron-vite build), preview (electron-vite preview), pack (electron-builder --dir), dist:mac (electron-builder --mac), dist:win (electron-builder --win), dist:linux (electron-builder --linux). Set main to 'out/main/index.js'.

verification.command: node -e "const p = require('./package.json'); console.log('main:', p.main, 'workspaces:', p.workspaces ?? 'NONE')"

subtasks.title: Create directory structure
subtasks.description: Create empty directory skeleton: src/main/, src/main/db/, src/main/motor/, src/preload/, src/renderer/src/, src/shared/, resources/. This establishes the Electron project layout before any files are moved.

verification.command: ls -d src/main src/main/db src/main/motor src/preload src/shared resources

subtasks.title: Create root tsconfig files
subtasks.description: Create tsconfig.json (root) extending @electron-toolkit/tsconfig/tsconfig.json with project references for main, preload, renderer. Create tsconfig.node.json for main+preload (Node target, ESM, resolveJsonModule). Create tsconfig.web.json for renderer (DOM target, jsx react-jsx, paths: @/ -> src/renderer/src/, @shared/ -> src/shared/). These replace the per-workspace tsconfigs.

verification.expected: No errors (may warn about no input files, which is OK at scaffold stage)

subtasks.title: Install dependencies and verify electron-vite
subtasks.description: Run npm install to pull all dependencies including electron, electron-vite, @egoist/tipc, electron-builder, @electron-toolkit/*. Then verify electron-vite is accessible. Also run electron-rebuild for better-sqlite3 against Electron's Node.js headers.

verification.expected: Both commands output version numbers without errors

phases.name: Main Process + Database
phases.description: Create Electron main process entry point with BrowserWindow lifecycle, move database layer (connection, schema, seed) to main process with app.getPath adaptation, configure graceful shutdown.

subtasks.title: Create database.ts (adapted connection)
subtasks.description: Rewrite apps/api/src/db/connection.ts as src/main/db/database.ts. Changes: (1) import { app } from 'electron', (2) DB path = app.isPackaged ? path.join(app.getPath('userData'), 'escalaflow.db') : path.join(__dirname, '../../data/escalaflow.db'), (3) add pragmas: cache_size = -64000, synchronous = NORMAL (keep existing WAL + foreign_keys), (4) export getDb() singleton + closeDb(). Pattern: lazy init on first call, must be called AFTER app.whenReady().

subtasks.title: Move schema.ts to main process
subtasks.description: Copy apps/api/src/db/schema.ts to src/main/db/schema.ts. Update import: change './connection' to './database'. Logic stays identical — createTables() function with all CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statements.

subtasks.title: Move seed.ts to main process
subtasks.description: Copy apps/api/src/db/seed.ts to src/main/db/seed.ts. Update import: change './connection' to './database', change '@escalaflow/shared' to '../../shared'. Logic stays identical — seedData() with INSERT IF NOT EXISTS pattern.

subtasks.title: Create main process entry (index.ts)
subtasks.description: Create src/main/index.ts with full Electron lifecycle: (1) import { app, BrowserWindow, shell } from 'electron', (2) app.whenReady() -> createTables() -> seedData() -> createWindow(), (3) createWindow(): BrowserWindow with webPreferences { contextIsolation: true, sandbox: true, nodeIntegration: false, preload: path.join(__dirname, '../preload/index.js') }, (4) Load renderer: dev mode -> process.env.ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL, prod -> file protocol with path.join(__dirname, '../renderer/index.html'), (5) app.on('window-all-closed') -> quit on non-darwin, (6) app.on('activate') -> recreate window on macOS, (7) app.on('before-quit') -> closeDb(). Register tipc router here (placeholder import for now).

phases.name: IPC Router (tipc)
phases.description: Convert all 34 Hono HTTP endpoints into tipc IPC procedures. This is the BIGGEST phase — all SQL logic from 7 route files gets consolidated into a single tipc router. Also move shared types/constants.

subtasks.title: Move shared types and constants
subtasks.description: Copy packages/shared/src/types.ts to src/shared/types.ts, packages/shared/src/constants.ts to src/shared/constants.ts, packages/shared/src/index.ts to src/shared/index.ts. No logic changes — these are pure type/constant definitions. Update index.ts re-exports if needed.

subtasks.title: Create tipc router — Empresa handlers (2 procedures)
subtasks.description: Create src/main/tipc.ts starting with empresa domain. Import { tipc } from '@egoist/tipc/main', import { getDb } from './db/database'. Define router with: empresa.buscar (SELECT * FROM empresa LIMIT 1) and empresa.atualizar (UPSERT nome, corte_semanal, tolerancia_semanal_min). Port SQL directly from apps/api/src/routes/empresa.ts (31 lines). Export router and router type.

subtasks.title: Add tipc handlers — TiposContrato (5 procedures)
subtasks.description: Add to src/main/tipc.ts: tiposContrato.listar, tiposContrato.buscar, tiposContrato.criar, tiposContrato.atualizar, tiposContrato.deletar. Port SQL from apps/api/src/routes/tipos-contrato.ts (63 lines). All CRUD operations with inline SQL.

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with tiposContrato handlers added

subtasks.title: Add tipc handlers — Setores + Demandas + Rank (10 procedures)
subtasks.description: Add to src/main/tipc.ts: setores.listar (with optional ?ativo filter), setores.buscar, setores.criar, setores.atualizar, setores.deletar, setores.listarDemandas, setores.criarDemanda, setores.atualizarDemanda, setores.deletarDemanda, setores.reordenarRank. Port SQL from apps/api/src/routes/setores.ts (163 lines). Rank handler updates colaborador rank positions in transaction.

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with setores handlers added

subtasks.title: Add tipc handlers — Colaboradores (5 procedures)
subtasks.description: Add to src/main/tipc.ts: colaboradores.listar (with optional setor_id and ativo filters), colaboradores.buscar, colaboradores.criar, colaboradores.atualizar, colaboradores.deletar (soft delete: ativo=0). Port SQL from apps/api/src/routes/colaboradores.ts (118 lines).

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with colaboradores handlers added

subtasks.title: Add tipc handlers — Excecoes (4 procedures)
subtasks.description: Add to src/main/tipc.ts: excecoes.listar (by colaborador_id), excecoes.criar, excecoes.atualizar, excecoes.deletar. Port SQL from apps/api/src/routes/excecoes.ts (46 lines).

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with excecoes handlers added

subtasks.title: Add tipc handlers — Escalas (5 procedures, gerar deferred to phase-4)
subtasks.description: Add to src/main/tipc.ts: escalas.buscar (EscalaCompleta with alocacoes + indicadores), escalas.listarPorSetor (with optional status filter), escalas.oficializar (check hard violations via validador, archive previous OFICIAL), escalas.ajustar (upsert alocacoes + revalidate via validador), escalas.deletar. Port SQL from apps/api/src/routes/escalas.ts (210 lines). NOTE: escalas.gerar is deferred to phase-4 (worker thread). Also move validador.ts to src/main/motor/validador.ts and include calcMinutos helper.

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with escalas handlers (minus gerar)

subtasks.title: Add tipc handlers — Dashboard (1 procedure)
subtasks.description: Add to src/main/tipc.ts: dashboard.resumo. Port SQL from apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts (76 lines). Aggregates: total setores, total colaboradores, total escalas, alertas. Returns DashboardResumo type.

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with all 33 handlers (34 minus gerar)

subtasks.title: Register tipc router in main process
subtasks.description: Update src/main/index.ts to import router from './tipc' and call registerIpcMain(router) inside app.whenReady(). This wires up all IPC handlers to Electron's ipcMain.

phases.name: Worker Thread for Motor
phases.description: Move gerador.ts to main process, create worker thread wrapper so schedule generation runs off the main thread (no UI freeze). Worker opens its OWN SQLite connection. Add escalas.gerar handler to tipc router.

subtasks.title: Move gerador.ts to main process
subtasks.description: Copy apps/api/src/motor/gerador.ts to src/main/motor/gerador.ts. Update import: change '@escalaflow/shared' to '../../shared'. Logic stays identical — gerarProposta(setorId, dataInicio, dataFim, db, tolerancia) function with DI db parameter.

subtasks.title: Create worker.ts wrapper
subtasks.description: Create src/main/motor/worker.ts: (1) import { parentPort, workerData } from 'worker_threads', (2) import Database from 'better-sqlite3', (3) Worker opens its OWN DB connection using same path logic as database.ts (NEVER share connection between threads), (4) Receive { setorId, dataInicio, dataFim, tolerancia, dbPath } from workerData, (5) Call gerarProposta() with worker's own db instance, (6) Post progress messages via parentPort.postMessage({ type: 'progress', percent }), (7) Post final result via parentPort.postMessage({ type: 'result', data: motorResultado }), (8) Close own DB connection when done.

subtasks.title: Add escalas.gerar handler to tipc router
subtasks.description: Add escalas.gerar to src/main/tipc.ts: (1) Validate setor has colaboradores and demandas (same checks as escalas.ts route), (2) Get tolerancia from empresa table, (3) Spawn Worker with src/main/motor/worker.ts (use ?modulePath for electron-vite resolution), (4) Pass { setorId, dataInicio, dataFim, tolerancia, dbPath }, (5) Wait for worker 'result' message, (6) Persist escala + alocacoes in transaction on MAIN thread (worker returns data, main persists), (7) Return EscalaCompleta. This is the most complex handler.

verification.expected: tipc.ts compiles with all 34 handlers complete

phases.name: Preload Script
phases.description: Create the preload bridge with contextBridge, exposing only whitelisted IPC methods. Create type declarations for window.electron.

subtasks.title: Create preload script
subtasks.description: Create src/preload/index.ts: (1) import { contextBridge, ipcRenderer } from 'electron', (2) import { exposeElectronAPI } from '@electron-toolkit/preload' (if available, else manual), (3) contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('electron', { ipcRenderer: { invoke: ipcRenderer.invoke, on: (channel, callback) => ipcRenderer.on(channel, callback), removeAllListeners: (channel) => ipcRenderer.removeAllListeners(channel) } }). DO NOT expose full ipcRenderer — only invoke and on for security.

subtasks.title: Create env.d.ts type declarations
subtasks.description: Create src/renderer/src/env.d.ts with: (1) type augmentation for Window to add electron property (ipcRenderer.invoke, ipcRenderer.on), (2) Reference to electron-vite/client types for import.meta.env, (3) Declare module for ?modulePath worker imports. Also create src/preload/index.d.ts if tipc needs explicit preload type bridge.

verification.expected: env.d.ts is valid, window.electron is typed

phases.name: Renderer Migration
phases.description: Move entire React app to src/renderer/, rewrite all 8 service files from fetch-based API calls to tipc IPC invoke calls, fix BrowserRouter -> HashRouter, update import paths, move configs.

subtasks.title: Move static assets and configs
subtasks.description: Move: apps/web/index.html -> src/renderer/index.html, apps/web/src/index.css -> src/renderer/src/index.css. Move tailwind.config.js -> root (or src/renderer/) and update content paths to ['./src/renderer/index.html', './src/renderer/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}']. Move postcss.config.js to root. Move components.json to root and update aliases to match new paths (css: src/renderer/src/index.css, tailwind config path).

verification.expected: All 4 files exist at new locations

subtasks.title: Move UI library (shadcn/ui components)
subtasks.description: Move all 17 files from apps/web/src/components/ui/*.tsx to src/renderer/src/components/ui/*.tsx. These are pure UI components with no API dependencies — only @/ alias imports for utils.ts. No logic changes needed, just file relocation. Files: button, card, badge, input, label, select, dialog, tabs, tooltip, table, breadcrumb, separator, collapsible, scroll-area, sheet, skeleton, alert-dialog, sidebar, sonner.

subtasks.title: Move lib utilities
subtasks.description: Move apps/web/src/lib/utils.ts, apps/web/src/lib/cores.ts, apps/web/src/lib/formatadores.ts to src/renderer/src/lib/. No changes needed — these are pure utility functions.

subtasks.title: Move hooks and state
subtasks.description: Move apps/web/src/hooks/useApiData.ts and apps/web/src/hooks/use-mobile.tsx to src/renderer/src/hooks/. Move apps/web/src/estado/store.ts to src/renderer/src/estado/store.ts. useApiData uses Promise-based fetcher pattern which is compatible with IPC invoke() — no changes needed. Update @escalaflow/shared imports in store.ts to relative path or @shared/ alias.

verification.expected: All hook and state files present

subtasks.title: Move custom components
subtasks.description: Move all 7 custom components from apps/web/src/componentes/ to src/renderer/src/componentes/: AppSidebar.tsx, ErrorBoundary.tsx, PageHeader.tsx, StatusBadge.tsx, PontuacaoBadge.tsx, EscalaGrid.tsx, ExportarEscala.tsx. Update @escalaflow/shared imports to relative paths or @shared/ alias in EscalaGrid.tsx and ExportarEscala.tsx (they import Alocacao, Colaborador, etc types).

subtasks.title: Move page components
subtasks.description: Move all 9 page files from apps/web/src/paginas/ to src/renderer/src/paginas/: Dashboard.tsx, SetorLista.tsx, SetorDetalhe.tsx, ColaboradorLista.tsx, ColaboradorDetalhe.tsx, EscalaPagina.tsx, ContratoLista.tsx, EmpresaConfig.tsx, NaoEncontrado.tsx. Update @escalaflow/shared imports in any page that imports types directly. Pages import services via @/servicos/ which will be rewritten in next subtask.

subtasks.title: Create tipc client (replaces api.ts)
subtasks.description: Create src/renderer/src/servicos/client.ts: (1) Import createClient from '@egoist/tipc/renderer', (2) Import type { Router } from '../../main/tipc' (or via shared type export), (3) Export const client = createClient<Router>({ ipcInvoke: window.electron.ipcRenderer.invoke }). This replaces the fetch-based api.ts with a type-safe IPC client. All service files will import { client } instead of { api }.

verification.expected: client.ts compiles with typed IPC client

subtasks.title: Rewrite setores service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/setores.ts: Replace all api.get/post/put/del calls with client.invoke() calls. 10 methods: listar (client.invoke('setores.listar', {ativo})), buscar, criar, atualizar, deletar, listarDemandas, criarDemanda, atualizarDemanda, deletarDemanda, reordenarRank. Update import from './api' to './client'. Update @escalaflow/shared imports to relative shared path.

subtasks.title: Rewrite colaboradores service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/colaboradores.ts: Replace api calls with client.invoke(). 5 methods: listar, buscar, criar, atualizar, deletar. Update imports.

subtasks.title: Rewrite excecoes service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/excecoes.ts: Replace api calls with client.invoke(). 4 methods: listar, criar, atualizar, deletar. Update imports.

subtasks.title: Rewrite escalas service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/escalas.ts: Replace api calls with client.invoke(). 6 methods: gerar, buscar, listarPorSetor, oficializar, ajustar, deletar. Update imports. The gerar call is async and goes through the worker thread on the main side — but from the renderer's perspective it's just client.invoke('escalas.gerar', data).

subtasks.title: Rewrite tipos-contrato service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/tipos-contrato.ts: Replace api calls with client.invoke(). 5 methods: listar, buscar, criar, atualizar, deletar. Update imports.

subtasks.title: Rewrite empresa service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/empresa.ts: Replace api calls with client.invoke(). 2 methods: buscar, atualizar. Update imports.

subtasks.title: Rewrite dashboard service (fetch -> IPC)
subtasks.description: Rewrite src/renderer/src/servicos/dashboard.ts: Replace api call with client.invoke(). 1 method: resumo. Update imports.

subtasks.title: Move App.tsx and main.tsx (fix BrowserRouter -> HashRouter)
subtasks.description: Move apps/web/src/App.tsx to src/renderer/src/App.tsx — no changes, just update imports if needed. Move apps/web/src/main.tsx to src/renderer/src/main.tsx — CRITICAL CHANGE: replace BrowserRouter with HashRouter (import { HashRouter } from 'react-router-dom'). BrowserRouter uses HTML5 pushState which doesn't work with Electron file:// protocol in production. HashRouter uses URL hash (#/) which works everywhere. One import + one JSX tag swap.

verification.expected: 1 or more matches — HashRouter is in use

subtasks.title: Full TypeScript verification of renderer
subtasks.description: Run full TypeScript check on the renderer to catch any broken imports — @escalaflow/shared references, @/ alias issues, missing type declarations. Fix any remaining import path issues across all moved files.

phases.name: Integration Verification
phases.description: Boot the full Electron app in dev mode. Verify all 8 pages render, CRUD operations work through IPC, schedule generation runs in worker thread without freezing UI, DnD ranking works.

subtasks.title: First boot — electron-vite dev
subtasks.description: Run npm run dev (electron-vite dev). Verify: (1) Electron window opens, (2) React app loads in renderer, (3) No console errors in main process, (4) No console errors in renderer DevTools, (5) Database is created at correct path, (6) Tables are created and seeded.

verification.instructions: Run 'npm run dev'. Electron window should open showing Dashboard page. Check main process console and renderer DevTools for errors. Verify data/escalaflow.db exists and has tables.

subtasks.title: Verify Dashboard page
subtasks.description: Navigate to Dashboard. Verify: resumo data loads (total setores, colaboradores, escalas), alertas render, no loading spinners stuck, no API errors.

verification.instructions: Dashboard shows summary cards with setor/colaborador/escala counts. No errors in console.

subtasks.title: Verify CRUD — Setores
subtasks.description: Test full CRUD cycle: create a new setor, verify it appears in list, edit it, verify changes persist, navigate to SetorDetalhe, verify demandas load, create/edit/delete a demanda. Test rank reorder via DnD (if colaboradores exist).

verification.instructions: Create setor 'Teste' -> appears in list -> edit name -> changes persist -> navigate to detail -> demandas section works -> delete setor.

subtasks.title: Verify CRUD — Colaboradores + Excecoes
subtasks.description: Create colaborador assigned to a setor, verify form submission, verify list renders, edit colaborador, verify ColaboradorDetalhe page, add/edit/delete excecao (ferias, atestado).

verification.instructions: Full CRUD flow for colaboradores and excecoes works. ColaboradorDetalhe shows excecoes list.

subtasks.title: Verify schedule generation (worker thread)
subtasks.description: Navigate to EscalaPagina, select a setor with colaboradores and demandas, click 'Gerar Escala'. Verify: (1) UI does NOT freeze during generation, (2) Loading indicator shows, (3) EscalaCompleta returns with alocacoes, (4) EscalaGrid renders correctly, (5) Indicadores (pontuacao, cobertura, violacoes) display, (6) No worker thread errors in main process console.

verification.instructions: Generate escala for a setor. UI stays responsive. Grid shows allocation. Score/indicators appear. No errors.

subtasks.title: Verify escala lifecycle (ajustar, oficializar, descartar)
subtasks.description: After generating a RASCUNHO escala: (1) Adjust allocations via ajustar endpoint — verify revalidation updates indicadores, (2) Oficializar — verify status changes to OFICIAL (only if 0 hard violations), (3) Generate another RASCUNHO — verify previous OFICIAL becomes ARQUIVADA, (4) Delete/discard a RASCUNHO.

verification.instructions: Full escala lifecycle: generate -> adjust -> oficializar -> verify archival of previous. All status transitions correct.

subtasks.title: Verify remaining pages (ContratoLista, EmpresaConfig)
subtasks.description: Navigate to ContratoLista: verify tipos contrato list renders, can create/edit/delete. Navigate to EmpresaConfig: verify empresa data loads, can edit nome/corte_semanal/tolerancia, changes persist.

verification.instructions: ContratoLista CRUD works. EmpresaConfig shows data and saves changes.

subtasks.title: Verify zero HTTP — no fetch calls
subtasks.description: Open renderer DevTools Network tab. Navigate through ALL pages, perform CRUD operations. Verify: ZERO HTTP requests to localhost or any URL. All communication should be through IPC (invisible in Network tab). Search codebase for 'fetch(' and 'localhost' — should find NONE in src/renderer/.

verification.command: grep -r 'fetch(' src/renderer/src/servicos/ || echo 'CLEAN: No fetch calls found'

phases.name: Packaging
phases.description: Configure electron-builder for distributable builds. Create config for macOS (dmg), Windows (nsis), Linux (AppImage). Handle native module unpacking from ASAR. Test local build.

subtasks.title: Create electron-builder.yml
subtasks.description: Create electron-builder.yml at project root: appId: com.escalaflow.desktop, productName: EscalaFlow, directories: { buildResources: resources, output: dist }, files: ['out/**/*'], asarUnpack: ['**/*.node', '**/better-sqlite3/**']. Mac config: category DeveloperTool, target [dmg, zip]. Win config: target [nsis]. Linux config: target [AppImage]. Configure icon paths in resources/ (icon.icns for mac, icon.ico for win, icon.png for linux).

verification.expected: appId: com.escalaflow.desktop visible in first lines

subtasks.title: Create placeholder app icons
subtasks.description: Create minimal placeholder icons in resources/: icon.png (512x512 for Linux + source), icon.icns (macOS), icon.ico (Windows). Can be simple placeholder — real icons come later. At minimum need icon.png.

subtasks.title: Update .gitignore for Electron artifacts
subtasks.description: Update .gitignore: add out/ (electron-vite build output), dist/ (electron-builder output), *.dmg, *.exe, *.AppImage, *.snap, *.deb, *.rpm. Keep data/ and node_modules/ ignores.

subtasks.title: Test electron-vite build
subtasks.description: Run npm run build (electron-vite build). Verify: out/main/index.js exists, out/preload/index.js exists, out/renderer/ contains built React app. No build errors.

verification.command: npm run build && ls out/main/index.js out/preload/index.js out/renderer/index.html
verification.expected: Build succeeds, all 3 output entry points exist

subtasks.title: Test electron-builder pack (directory build)
subtasks.description: Run npm run pack (electron-builder --dir). This creates an unpacked app directory in dist/ without creating a distributable. Verify: dist/ contains app directory, better-sqlite3 .node files are unpacked from ASAR, app launches from dist/.

verification.expected: dist/ directory contains packed app (mac-arm64/ or similar)

subtasks.title: Test packaged app launch
subtasks.description: Launch the packed app from dist/ directory. Verify: (1) App opens without errors, (2) DB is created in userData path (not project root), (3) All pages work, (4) Schedule generation works (worker thread loads native module from unpacked ASAR). This validates RISK-01 and RISK-02.

verification.instructions: Launch packed app from dist/. All pages work. Generate escala succeeds. DB file appears in ~/Library/Application Support/EscalaFlow/ (macOS).

phases.name: Cleanup
phases.description: Remove old monorepo structure (apps/, packages/), remove workspace config, verify final project is clean single-project Electron app.

subtasks.title: Remove apps/api/
subtasks.description: Delete entire apps/api/ directory. This removes: Hono server (index.ts), all HTTP routes (7 files), old connection.ts, old schema/seed copies. All logic has been migrated to src/main/.

subtasks.title: Remove apps/web/
subtasks.description: Delete entire apps/web/ directory. This removes: old React app, old vite.config.ts, old package.json. All files have been moved to src/renderer/.

subtasks.title: Remove packages/shared/
subtasks.description: Delete entire packages/shared/ directory. Types and constants have been moved to src/shared/.

subtasks.title: Remove empty apps/ and packages/ directories
subtasks.description: Remove the now-empty apps/ and packages/ parent directories if they exist.

verification.command: test ! -d apps && test ! -d packages && echo 'CLEAN' || echo 'DIRECTORIES REMAIN'

subtasks.title: Remove old workspace tsconfig files
subtasks.description: Delete any leftover per-workspace tsconfig files: apps/api/tsconfig.json, apps/web/tsconfig.json, packages/shared/tsconfig.json (should be gone with directory deletion, but verify). Remove .gitkeep placeholder files from src/ subdirectories.

subtasks.title: Final verification — clean build from scratch
subtasks.description: Full verification cycle: (1) rm -rf node_modules out dist, (2) npm install, (3) npx tsc --noEmit (0 errors), (4) npm run build (electron-vite build succeeds), (5) npm run dev (app boots correctly), (6) Verify no @escalaflow/shared imports remain, (7) Verify no 'hono' imports remain, (8) Verify no fetch() calls in renderer services.

verification.command: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build && grep -r '@escalaflow/shared' src/ || echo 'CLEAN' && grep -r 'from.*hono' src/ || echo 'CLEAN'
verification.expected: TypeScript clean, build clean, no legacy imports

breakdown.phase_3_ipc_router: 9 subtasks — 34 HTTP endpoints converted to tipc handlers
breakdown.phase_4_worker_thread: 3 subtasks — motor in worker + gerar handler
breakdown.phase_6_renderer: 16 subtasks — move React app + rewrite 8 services
breakdown.phase_7_integration: 8 subtasks — verify all pages and flows

summary.critical_path: phase-1 -> phase-2 -> phase-3 -> phase-4 -> phase-6 -> phase-7 -> phase-8 -> phase-9 (phase-5 can run parallel with phase-3/4)
high_risk_subtasks: phase-4-subtask-2 (worker.ts — native module loading in worker threads)
phase-4-subtask-3 (escalas.gerar via worker — most complex handler)
phase-8-subtask-6 (packaged app launch — validates native module in ASAR)

plan.verification_summary: Each phase ends with npx tsc --noEmit verification. Phase 7 is a dedicated integration phase with 8 manual verification subtasks covering all 8 pages, CRUD operations, worker thread schedule generation, and zero-HTTP validation. Phase 8 tests build pipeline from electron-vite build through electron-builder pack to app launch.
blockers: better-sqlite3 must rebuild against Electron's Node.js headers — if electron-rebuild fails, entire migration is blocked
@egoist/tipc API must be verified — if incompatible with current Electron version, fallback to manual ipcMain.handle/ipcRenderer.invoke pattern
notes: Business logic (motor gerador 777 lines + validador 393 lines) is untouched — only import paths change
UI (8 pages + 7 custom components + 17 shadcn/ui) is untouched — only file locations change
The tipc.ts file will be the BIGGEST new file (~400 lines) consolidating all 7 Hono route files into one IPC router
Worker thread approach: worker computes, main thread persists — this avoids sharing DB connections across threads
BrowserRouter -> HashRouter is a one-line change that prevents route 404s on file:// protocol
useApiData hook is Promise-based — IPC invoke() returns Promise — zero changes needed in the hook itself
